channel.title: UK NGO & Charity Jobs
channel.description: Job listings for UK NGOs roles, scraped by Pol-Intel.

item.title: Chair and Trustees Georgia’s Voice (Cornwall)
item.description: Make a difference where it matters most. Help save young women’s lives.

item.title: Trustee and Chair of Trustees
item.description: Help shape the future of environmental philanthropy and strengthen funding for climate, nature and people.

item.title: Trustee Treasurer
item.description: Volunteer Treasurer to join ACRE’s Board, leading financial oversight to support thriving rural communities across England.

item.title: Non-Trustee Grants Committee Member
item.description: Join Richmond Foundation as a Trustee and help shape a fairer, healthier future for our community.

item.title: Trustee
item.description: Join Richmond Foundation as a Trustee and help shape a fairer, healthier future for our community.

item.title: Treasurer & Trustee
item.description: Treasurer and Trustee of Guildford Samaritans

item.title: Trustee
item.description: We believe a love of reading in early life is absolutely vital to future wellbeing and research from the National Literacy Trust supports this.

item.title: Volunteer tour guide & training advisor
item.description: We’re recruiting new guides and we’re looking for volunteers with tour guiding experience to help us refresh and strengthen our training!

item.title: Cat Welfare Team Leader Volunteer - Caithness Cats Protection
Branch Team Leader Volunteer - Caithness Cats Protection
Treasurer Volunteer - Stourbridge, Dudley & Wyre Forest
item.description: Our treasurer volunteers maintain the finances of local groups and teams, ensuring they hold the funds needed to continue their vital work.

item.title: Fundraising Team Leader Volunteer - Stafford & District
Trustee
item.description: If you have experience in finance, audit, risk and fiduciary oversight in the UK charity sector, you can make a meaningful impact at All We Can.

item.title: Trustee
item.description: We are looking for strategically minded people with skills and experience in Finance, Income Generation / Fundraising & Governance.

item.title: Trustee
item.description: Could you become a Trustee and help to make a wilder Hertfordshire and Middlesex?

item.title: Photo And Video Moderation & Face Recognition
Treasurer
item.description: Clean Break is looking to appoint a Treasurer to join their Board of Trustees and Finance Committee.

item.title: Assistant Director of Philanthropy & Strategic Partnership
item.description: Have you delivered high-value fundraising and partnerships at a senior level and are ready to take on a role with significant national influence?

item.title: Senior Legacy Manager
item.description: We are seeking an experienced and passionate Senior Legacy Manager to lead and grow our legacy programme.

item.title: Head of Face to Face Fundraising
item.description: The Head of Face-to-Face Fundraising provides strategic leadership and operational oversight of the RSPB’s face-to-face fundraising programme

item.title: Associate Director of Development – Principal Gifts
item.description: An exceptional opportunity at one of the world's most prestigious universities at a time of extraordinary ambition and philanthropic momentum.

item.title: Fundraising and Partnerships Manager
item.description: We are seeking a strategic, relationship driven fundraiser to grow income, build partnerships and help prevent homelessness across the East Midlands.

item.title: Corporate Partnerships Coordinator
item.description: We are seeking a highly organised Corporate Partnerships Coordinator to help deliver exceptional stewardship and engagement for corporate supporters.

item.title: Senior Philanthropy & Partnerships Manager
item.description: We are seeking an experienced Senior Philanthropy & Partnerships Manager to lead high value fundraising and build transformational relationships

item.title: Individual Giving & Engagement Manager
item.description: We are seeking a strategic and creative Individual Giving & Engagement Manager to grow supporter income and deepen relationships with individuals

item.title: Press Officer
item.description: We are seeking a creative and proactive Press Officer to grow media coverage, build strong journalist relationships and raise the profile

item.title: Senior Philanthropy Officer
item.description: Working to move various funding streams through the philanthropy giving cycle; identification, cultivation, solicitation, stewardship & recognition.

item.title: Associate Director, Scotland
item.description: Could you build strong relationships across health and social care, Scottish Parliament and Government, and the wider stroke community?

item.title: Philanthropy Manager
item.description: Could you implement plans to attract high-value individual philanthropists, and cultivate and steward donors?

item.title: Estate Manager
item.description: We are seeking a skilled and proactive Estate Manager to support residents and help create well managed, sustainable and thriving communities.

item.title: Director of Development, Alumni and Campaigns
Employment Specialist - Connect to Work
item.description: This organisation is looking for an Employment Specialist to support the delivery of their Connect to Work programme.

item.title: Communications Manager
item.description: Are you a creative, organised and detail-oriented professional with a passion for delivering impactful marketing campaigns?

item.title: Events Fundraiser Product Development
item.description: Do you want to design innovative fundraising products and events that engage supporters and make a tangible difference for patients?

item.title: Community Fundraiser
item.description: Join a team, where every fundraiser you inspire helps bring life-saving innovations to patients in Cambridge and beyond.

item.title: Employment Coach – Northern Futures
item.description: Do you have prior experience in employment coaching and the confidence to positively engage and motivate people from a wide range of backgrounds?

item.title: Programme Quality Coordinator - Connect to Work
item.description: Our client is seeking a motivated professional who can uphold high standards of quality and collaboration across a complex programme environment.

item.title: Senior Policy and Advocacy Advisor
item.description: We are seeking an authentic advocate for children’s rights to help drive our influence with government and other stakeholders.

item.title: Fundraising Manager
item.description: We are now seeking an experienced & motivated Fundraising Manager (South West) to help grow sustainable income & strengthen the regional partnerships

item.title: Researcher
item.description: Contribute to the delivery of high-quality mixed-methods research projects including evidence synthesis, primary research and evaluation studies.

item.title: Empowering Curators Programme Manager
item.description: Do you have strong project management skills, experience in arts or cultural programmes, and a commitment to equity & inclusion?

item.title: Head of Global Development, Asia
item.description: Here at Imperial College, we are recruiting our Head of Global Development, North America, to join our growing team.

item.title: Head of Principal Gifts
item.description: Here at Imperial College, we are recruiting for a Head of Principal Gifts, to join our growing team.

item.title: Registration manager
item.description: We are seeking an experienced Registration manager to lead membership and registration services

item.title: Project Facilitator
item.description: Project facilitators are central to what we do, connecting business leaders and charity leaders, creating collaborative environments to build skills.

item.title: Assistant Safeguarding Adviser
item.description: We are seeking a motivated and skilled part time Assistant Diocesan Safeguarding Adviser to join the friendly and committed Diocesan Safeguarding.rdi

item.title: Chief Executive Officer
item.description: Our client has been providing independent advocacy for vulnerable people in Solihull for over 25 years.

item.title: Domestic Abuse Caseworker
item.description: We are seeking a dedicated and compassionate Caseworker to join the Domestic Abuse team based in Basingstoke.

item.title: Senior Marketing Manager
item.description: This is a great opportunity to join the UK Committee for UNICEF (UNICEF UK) as a Senior Marketing Manager.

item.title: Marketing Manager
item.description: This is a great opportunity to join the UK Committee for UNICEF (UNICEF UK) as Marketing Manager.

item.title: Director of Learning, Grants & Partnerships
item.description: We are seeking an experienced and strategic leader to drive impactful learning, grant-making and partnerships across a national educational charity.

item.title: Ecommerce and Fulfilment Manager
item.description: As part of our Customer Engagement and Experience team, you’ll play a key role in delivering an exceptional supporter experience.

item.title: Treasurer / Trustee
item.description: You will oversee the financial matters of the charity and chair the Audit and Risk Sub-Committee reporting regularly to the board.

item.title: Head of Principal Gifts
item.description: If you're a major gifts or big gift fundraiser ready to make your mark and take that next career-defining step , we'd love to hear from you.

item.title: Strategy, Partnership, Policy and Communication Lead
item.description: We are looking for a Strategy, Partnership, Policy and Communication Lead to join the International Emergency Services (IES) team!

item.title: Senior Project Manager
item.description: We are recruiting for a PMO Lead to join the IPS Grow team.

item.title: Compliance Officer (Fundraising)
item.description: Day to day, you will deliver compliance tasks, maintain key documentation & provide practical guidance to teams

item.title: Education & Development Manager
item.description: This role leads the development and delivery of our client's employer's training, learning and professional development offer.

item.title: Individual Giving and Lottery Manager
item.description: Do you have experience in developing creative fundraising campaigns and supporter journeys?

item.title: Learning Disability Practice and Projects Lead
item.description: Join a small and friendly mission driven team as a Learning Disability Practice and Projects Lead

item.title: Head of Strategic Partnerships
item.description: This is a senior, influential role requiring a talented, relational fundraising professional

item.title: Data and Systems Manager
item.description: This charity is looking for a Data and Systems Manager to help them understand and look after their supporters even better!

item.title: Senior Grants Officer
item.description: Manage £3.5m in grants for the Goldsmiths’ Foundation. Lead proactive funding and restricted funds to support vocational skills in the jewelry trade.

item.title: Director of Finance & Operations
item.description: Help to shape the future of the world’s first children’s hospice and make a profound difference to the lives of local families.

item.title: Finance Director
item.description: Use your senior financial expertise to support a diverse network of worshipping communities and create positive social change.
